HGSS.252.0000:

Vermilion City.\f
We will make an announcement when
we arrive.
HGSS.252.0001:

is en route to Olivine City.\f
We will make an announcement when
we arrive.
HGSS.252.0002:
Fast Ship S.S. Aqua
has arrived in Vermilion City.\f
HGSS.252.0003:

has arrived in Vermilion City.
HGSS.252.0004:
Huh?
It’s already arrived in Vermilion City.\f
HGSS.252.0005:
Fast Ship S.S. Aqua
has arrived in Olivine City.\f
HGSS.252.0006:
Fast Ship S.S. Aqua
has arrived in Olivine City.
HGSS.252.0007:
Whoa! Excuse me. I was in a hurry!\f
My granddaughter is missing!\f
She’s just a wee girl. If you see
her, please let me know!\f
HGSS.252.0008:
Here’s your cabin.\f
If your Pokémon are hurt, take a
nap in the bed.\r
That will heal them.
HGSS.252.0009:
Here’s your cabin.\f
You can heal your Pokémon
by taking a nap in the bed.\f
The ship will arrive while
you’re sleeping.
HGSS.252.0010:
Most passengers are Trainers.\f
They’re all itching to battle in
their cabins.
